CustomField.formula:
IF( ISBLANK( Shop__c ),
CASE(Customer__r.SAP_Customer_Code__c, '0000510468', IF(LEFT(Shop_Code_Upload__c , 2) = 'XP', '展会', IF(LEFT(Shop_Code_Upload__c , 3) = 'S88' , '线上', '其他')) , '0000507684', IF(LEFT(Shop_Code_Upload__c , 3) = '988','线上', IF(ISNUMBER(Shop_Code_Upload__c),IF( VALUE(Shop_Code_Upload__c) <= 1000, '分拣仓', '其他'),'其他')), '0000511016', IF(LEFT(Shop_Code_Upload__c , 2) = '99', '分拣仓', '其他'), '0000507925','其他', '')
, CASE(Customer__r.SAP_Customer_Code__c, '0000510468', '线下数据', '0000507684', '线下数据', '0000511016', '线下数据', '0000507925', '线下数据', '') )
CustomField.label: Data Type
